name: Turkeylegs Provenciale
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the turkey legs into large pieces.
2. Heat the olive oil in a skillet and brown the meat on all sides.
3. Add the chopped onions, minced garlic, rosemary, and halved hot pepper (with kernels removed) to the skillet. Fry everything together with the meat.
4. Chop up the tomatoes and add them along with their juice, olives, and sliced almonds to the mixture.
5. Cover the pot and simmer for 1 hour and 15 minutes. Add the white wine and heat through once more before serving.
